features: Hair Ties Set: You will get 28 boho hair ties in 6 different styles and 11 different colors. The different colors and styles in the set are enough to meet your different daily matching needs
Soft and Comfortable: Our bracelet hair ties are made of nylon cotton, which is soft to the touch and easy to stretch, not easy to damage or pull your hair, easy and comfortable to wear

Hair Ties Bracelet: This boho hairband is not only suitable for creating various hairstyles, but also can be worn on the wrist as a fashion bracelet when not in use, so that you can use it anytime, anywhere
Great Gift: Bohemian hair ties are a great gift, perfect as a surprise for your wife, mother, girlfriend, classmates on birthdays, holidays, anniversaries and other special occasions

Versatile Use: As a daily necessity, the headband is suitable for various occasions, whether as a hair band or a bracelet, you can use it in washing, cooking, sports, work, study, travel, party, ceremony, etc.
